mapper.select: SELECT DATE_SUB(MAX(RGSTR_TIME), INTERVAL 3 MINUTE) from TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(RGSTR_TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') from TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(tr_pmb.TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as TS, tcppi.PUMP_TYP AS PUMP_TYP, tr_pmb.VALUE AS pump_use, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX as PUMP_IDX, tcppi.PUMP_GRP, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_DSC as PUMP_GRP_NM, tcppi.PUMP_NM FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi LEFT JOIN TB_RAWDATA tr_pmb ON tr_pmb.TAGNAME = tcppi.PMB_TAG WHERE
tr_pmb.TS = (SELECT MAX(TS) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS <= #{startDate} AND TS > DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 10 MINUTE))
tr_pmb.TS <= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL #{cycle} MINUTE) AND tr_pmb.TS >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL #{range} HOUR) AND MINUTE(tr_pmb.TS) % #{cycle} = 0 GROUP BY tr_pmb.TS, tcppi.PUMP_GRP, tcppi.PUMP_IDX
ORDER BY tr_pmb.TS, tcppi.PUMP_GRP, tcppi.PUMP_IDX;

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(tr_spi.TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as TS, tcppi.PUMP_TYP AS PUMP_TYP, CAST(tr_spi.VALUE AS VARCHAR(10)) AS pump_freq, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX as PUMP_IDX, tcppi.PUMP_GRP, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_DSC as PUMP_GRP_NM, tcppi.PUMP_NM FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi LEFT JOIN TB_RAWDATA tr_spi ON tr_spi.TAGNAME = tcppi.SPI_TAG WHERE
tr_spi.TS = (SELECT MAX(TS) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS <= #{startDate} AND TS > DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 10 MINUTE))
tr_spi.TS <= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL #{cycle} MINUTE) AND tr_spi.TS >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL #{range} HOUR) AND MINUTE(tr_spi.TS) % #{cycle} = 0 GROUP BY tr_spi.TS, tcppi.PUMP_GRP, tcppi.PUMP_IDX
ORDER BY tr_spi.TS, tcppi.PUMP_GRP, tcppi.PUMP_IDX;

SELECT tr.TS, tcppi.PUMP_IDX, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, tr.TAGNAME, tr.VALUE * tpti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE as value FROM TB_RAWDATA tr, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF tpti WHERE tr.TAGNAME = tcppi.PWI_TAG AND tr.TAGNAME = tpti.PWI_TAG
AND tcppi.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp}
AND tr.TS = (select max(TS) from TB_RAWDATA where TS <= #{startDate} and TS > DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, interval 10 minute))
ORDER BY tcppi.PUMP_IDX ASC

SELECT sum(tlv.HH_LOSS_VAL) as lossVal from TB_FR_VAL tlv join TB_LINK_GRP tlg on tlg.LINK_ID = tlv.LINK_ID JOIN TB_TOT_GRP ttg ON tlg.GRP_NM = ttg.GRP_KEY where UPPER(tlv.FLG) = UPPER(#{opt_idx}) AND ttg.TOT_GRP = #{GRP_NM} and tlv.RGSTR_TIME = ( select max(rgstr_time) from TB_FR_VAL where rgstr_time <= #{startDate} and rgstr_time >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, interval 3 minute) ) GROUP BY tlv.RGSTR_TIME order by tlv.RGSTR_TIME desc limit 1;

SELECT SUM(tlv.HH_LOSS_VAL) AS lossVal, tlv.RGSTR_TIME as ts FROM TB_FR_VAL tlv JOIN TB_LINK_GRP tlg ON tlg.LINK_ID = tlv.LINK_ID JOIN TB_TOT_GRP ttg ON tlg.GRP_NM = ttg.GRP_KEY WHERE UPPER(tlv.FLG) = UPPER(#{opt_idx}) AND ttg.TOT_GRP = #{GRP_NM} AND tlv.RGSTR_TIME <= #{startDate} and tlv.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL #{range} hour) and MINUTE(tlv.RGSTR_TIME) % #{cycle} = 0 GROUP BY tlv.RGSTR_TIME ORDER BY tlv.RGSTR_TIME

SELECT FLW_ALG_RST_VAL AS linkVal, RGSTR_TIME as ts FROM TB_FR_VAL WHERE UPPER(FLG) = UPPER(#{opt_idx}) AND LINK_ID = #{link_id} AND RGSTR_TIME <= #{startDate} and RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL #{range} hour) and MINUTE(RGSTR_TIME) % #{cycle} = 0 GROUP BY RGSTR_TIME ORDER BY RGSTR_TIME

SELECT FP_ALG_RST_VAL AS nodeVal, RGSTR_TIME as ts FROM TB_FP_VAL WHERE UPPER(FLG) = UPPER(#{opt_idx}) AND NODE_ID = #{node_id} AND RGSTR_TIME <= #{startDate} and RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL #{range} hour) and MINUTE(RGSTR_TIME) % #{cycle} = 0 GROUP BY RGSTR_TIME ORDER BY RGSTR_TIME

SELECT FLW_ALG_RST_VAL AS linkVal, RGSTR_TIME as ts FROM TB_FR_SI_VAL WHERE LINK_ID = #{link_id} AND RGSTR_TIME <= #{startDate} and RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL #{range} hour) and MINUTE(RGSTR_TIME) % #{cycle} = 0 and FLG = 'mo' GROUP BY RGSTR_TIME ORDER BY RGSTR_TIME

SELECT FP_ALG_RST_VAL AS nodeVal, RGSTR_TIME as ts FROM TB_FP_SI_VAL WHERE NODE_ID = #{node_id} AND RGSTR_TIME <= #{startDate} and RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL #{range} hour) and MINUTE(RGSTR_TIME) % #{cycle} = 0 and FLG = 'mo' GROUP BY RGSTR_TIME ORDER BY RGSTR_TIME

SELECT FP_ALG_RST_VAL AS nodeVal FROM TB_FP_VAL WHERE UPPER(FLG) = UPPER(#{opt_idx}) AND NODE_ID = #{node_id} AND RGSTR_TIME = ( select max(rgstr_time) from TB_FP_VAL where rgstr_time <= #{startDate} and rgstr_time >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, interval 3 minute) and UPPER(FLG) = UPPER(#{opt_idx}) ) GROUP BY RGSTR_TIME order by RGSTR_TIME desc limit 1;

SELECT FLW_ALG_RST_VAL AS linkVal FROM TB_FR_VAL WHERE UPPER(FLG) = UPPER(#{opt_idx}) AND LINK_ID = #{link_id} AND RGSTR_TIME = ( select max(rgstr_time) from TB_FR_VAL where rgstr_time <= #{startDate} and rgstr_time >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, interval 3 minute) and UPPER(FLG) = UPPER(#{opt_idx}) ) GROUP BY RGSTR_TIME order by RGSTR_TIME desc limit 1;

SELECT FP_ALG_RST_VAL AS nodeVal FROM TB_FP_SI_VAL WHERE FLG = 'mo' AND NODE_ID = #{node_id} AND RGSTR_TIME = ( select max(rgstr_time) from TB_FP_SI_VAL where rgstr_time <= #{startDate} and rgstr_time >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, interval 3 minute) and FLG = 'mo' ) GROUP BY RGSTR_TIME order by RGSTR_TIME desc limit 1;

SELECT FLW_ALG_RST_VAL AS linkVal FROM TB_FR_SI_VAL WHERE FLG = 'mo' AND LINK_ID = #{link_id} AND RGSTR_TIME = ( select max(rgstr_time) from TB_FR_SI_VAL where rgstr_time <= #{startDate} and rgstr_time >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, interval 3 minute) and FLG = 'mo' ) GROUP BY RGSTR_TIME order by RGSTR_TIME desc limit 1;

SELECT tctr.PRDCT_VALUE as value, DATE_FORMAT(tctr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ts from TB_CTR_TNK_RST tctr WHERE UPPER(tctr.DSTRB_ID) = UPPER(#{DSTRB_ID}) and RGSTR_TIME <= #{nowDateTime} and RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{nowDateTime}, interval 10 minute) group by tctr.RGSTR_TIME order by tctr.RGSTR_TIME desc limit 1

SELECT VALUE as value, DATE_FORMAT(TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ts from TB_RAWDATA WHERE TAGNAME = #{DSTRB_ID} and TS <= DATE_SUB(#{nowDateTime}, interval 1 minute) and TS >= DATE_SUB(#{nowDateTime}, interval 5 minute) group by TS order by TS desc limit 1

SELECT CAST(PRDCT_VALUE as CHAR) as value, DATE_FORMAT(RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ts FROM TB_CTR_TNK_RST WHERE UPPER(DSTRB_ID) = UPPER(#{DSTRB_ID}) AND RGSTR_TIME <= #{nowDateTime} AND RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{nowDateTime}, interval 10 minute) GROUP BY RGSTR_TIME ORDER BY RGSTR_TIME DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT tctr.PRDCT_VALUE as value, DATE_FORMAT(tctr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ts,
tnt.FRI_TAG as tag, tnt.DSTRB_Q_ID as dstrb_id from TB_CTR_TNK_INF tnt join TB_CTR_TNK_RST tctr on tnt.DSTRB_Q_ID = tctr.DSTRB_ID WHERE UPPER(tnt.DSTRB_Q_ID) in
UPPER(#{id})
tnt.PRI_TAG as tag, tnt.DSTRB_P_ID as dstrb_id from TB_CTR_TNK_INF tnt join TB_CTR_TNK_RST tctr on tnt.DSTRB_P_ID = tctr.DSTRB_ID WHERE UPPER(tnt.DSTRB_P_ID) in
UPPER(#{id})
and
tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, interval 1 minute) and tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, interval 3 minute) order by tctr.RGSTR_TIME limit 1;
tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= #{startDate} and tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 12 hour) order by tctr.RGSTR_TIME;
mapper.sql: WITH RECURSIVE A AS ( SELECT STR_TO_DATE(DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 12 hour), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') AS TS UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(A.TS, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS TS FROM A WHERE A.TS <= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') )
WITH RECURSIVE A AS ( SELECT STR_TO_DATE(DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') AS TS )
mapper.select: SELECT tr.TS, tr.VALUE as value, tr.TAGNAME as tag from TB_RAWDATA tr WHERE tr.TAGNAME IN ( '780-344-PRC-6004', '780-344-PRC-4004' ) AND tr.TS <= #{startDate} AND tr.TS >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 12 hour) AND MINUTE(tr.TS) % 5 = 0 order by tr.TS;

SELECT tr.TS, tr.VALUE AS value FROM TB_RAWDATA tr WHERE tr.TAGNAME IN ( SELECT PRI_T_TAG FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF WHERE PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} ) AND tr.TS BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 12 HOUR) AND #{startDate} AND MINUTE(tr.TS) % 5 = 0 GROUP BY tr.TS ORDER BY tr.TS

SELECT tctr.RGSTR_TIME as ts, tctr.PRDCT_VALUE as value, tnt.FRI_TAG as tag, tnt.DSTRB_Q_ID as dstrb_id from TB_CTR_TNK_RST tctr LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_TNK_INF tnt on tnt.DSTRB_Q_ID = tctr.DSTRB_ID WHERE UPPER(tnt.DSTRB_Q_ID) in
UPPER(#{id})
AND
tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= #{startDate} AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 12 hour) order by tctr.RGSTR_TIME
tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 3 MINUTE) AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= #{startDate} order by tctr.RGSTR_TIME desc limit 1

SELECT tctr.RGSTR_TIME as ts, tctr.PRDCT_VALUE as value, tnt.PRI_TAG as tag, tnt.DSTRB_P_ID as dstrb_id from TB_CTR_TNK_RST tctr LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_TNK_INF tnt on tnt.DSTRB_P_ID = tctr.DSTRB_ID WHERE UPPER(tnt.DSTRB_P_ID) in
UPPER(#{id})
AND
tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= #{startDate} AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 12 hour) order by tctr.RGSTR_TIME
tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 3 MINUTE) AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= #{startDate} order by tctr.RGSTR_TIME desc limit 1

SELECT COALESCE(inquiry.RGSTR_TIME, rst.RGSTR_TIME) AS ts, ROUND(CAST(COALESCE(inquiry.TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, rst.TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT) AS FLOAT), 1) AS value, '780-344-PRC-6004' as tag FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST AS rst LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY AS inquiry ON rst.OPT_IDX = inquiry.OPT_IDX AND rst.PUMP_GRP = inquiry.PUMP_GRP AND rst.RGSTR_TIME = inquiry.RGSTR_TIME WHERE rst.PUMP_GRP = 2 AND
rst.RGSTR_TIME <= #{startDate} AND rst.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 12 hour) AND MINUTE(rst.RGSTR_TIME) % 5 = 0 GROUP BY rst.RGSTR_TIME ORDER BY rst.RGSTR_TIME
rst.RGSTR_TIME <= DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 3 MINUTE) AND rst.RGSTR_TIME >= #{startDate} GROUP BY rst.RGSTR_TIME ORDER BY rst.RGSTR_TIME DESC limit 1

SELECT tctr.RGSTR_TIME as ts, tctr.DSTRB_ID as junction_id, tctr.PRDCT_VALUE as value from TB_CTR_TNK_RST tctr WHERE UPPER(tctr.DSTRB_ID) = UPPER(#{DSTRB_ID}) AND
tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= #{startDate} AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 12 hour) order by tctr.RGSTR_TIME
tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 3 MINUTE) AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= #{startDate} order by tctr.RGSTR_TIME desc limit 1

SELECT tpc.PUMP_GRP, tpc.C_IDX, tpc.C_ORD, tpc.FC_VAL, tpc.P_ADD_VAL, tpc.CS_OP, tpc.P_MUL_VAL, tpc.SS_OP, tpc.P_SQRT_MUL_VAL, tpc.PUMP_COMB, tpc.PUMP_COUNT, tpc.PUMP_PRIORITY, tpc.COUNT_IDX, tpc.USE_YN FROM TB_PUMP_CAL tpc LEFT JOIN TB_PUMP_COMBINATION_INF tpci ON tpc.PUMP_COUNT = tpci.PUMP_COUNT AND tpc.PUMP_PRIORITY = tpci.PUMP_PRIORITY WHERE tpci.USE_YN = 1 AND tpc.USE_YN = 1 ORDER BY tpc.PUMP_GRP, tpc.C_IDX, tpc.C_ORD, tpc.PUMP_COUNT , tpc.PUMP_PRIORITY;

SELECT AVG(PRDCT_VALUE) FROM ( SELECT PRDCT_VALUE FROM TB_CTR_TNK_RST WHERE DSTRB_ID = #{DSTRB_ID} AND PRDCT_VALUE IS NOT NULL AND PRDCT_VALUE != 0 AND RGSTR_TIME <= #{nowDateTime} ORDER BY RGSTR_TIME DESC LIMIT 10 ) AS recent_data

SELECT cal.PUMP_GRP, cal.C_IDX, cal.C_ORD, cal.FC_VAL, cal.P_ADD_VAL, cal.CS_OP, cal.P_MUL_VAL, cal.SS_OP, cal.P_SQRT_MUL_VAL, -- C_ORD가 1인 경우에만 조합 펌프를 보여줍니다. CASE WHEN cal.C_ORD = 1 THEN IFNULL(combo.ACTIVE_PUMPS, cal.PUMP_COMB) ELSE cal.PUMP_COMB END AS PUMP_COMB, cal.PUMP_COUNT, cal.PUMP_PRIORITY, cal.COUNT_IDX, cal.USE_YN FROM TB_PUMP_CAL AS cal -- TB_PUMP_COMBINATION_INF 테이블을 INNER JOIN하여 USE_YN이 1인 조합만 선택 INNER JOIN TB_PUMP_COMBINATION_INF AS inf ON cal.PUMP_GRP = inf.PUMP_GRP AND cal.PUMP_COUNT = inf.PUMP_COUNT AND cal.PUMP_PRIORITY = inf.PUMP_PRIORITY AND inf.USE_YN = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PUMP_GRP, PUMP_COUNT, PUMP_PRIORITY, GROUP_CONCAT(PUMP_IDX ORDER BY PUMP_IDX) AS ACTIVE_PUMPS FROM TB_PUMP_COMBINATION WHERE PUMP_YN = 1 GROUP BY PUMP_GRP, PUMP_COUNT, PUMP_PRIORITY ) AS combo ON cal.PUMP_GRP = combo.PUMP_GRP AND cal.PUMP_COUNT = combo.PUMP_COUNT AND cal.PUMP_PRIORITY = combo.PUMP_PRIORITY WHERE cal.USE_YN = 1 ORDER BY cal.PUMP_GRP, cal.C_IDX, cal.C_ORD, cal.PUMP_COUNT, cal.PUMP_PRIORITY;

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(tctr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ts, tctr.PRDCT_VALUE as value, tcti.SRTTN as srttn from TB_CTR_TNK_INF tcti join
TB_CTR_TNK_RST tctr on UPPER(tcti.DSTRB_Q_ID) = UPPER(tctr.DSTRB_ID)
TB_CTR_TNK_RST tctr on UPPER(tcti.DSTRB_P_ID) = UPPER(tctr.DSTRB_ID)
WHERE tcti.TYPE = #{type}
AND tcti.USE_YN IN (#{pump_grp}, 0)
AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, interval 1 minute) AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, interval 5 minute), INTERVAL #{range} hour) AND MINUTE(tctr.RGSTR_TIME) % #{cycle} = 0 UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(tctr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ts, tctr.PRDCT_VALUE as value, tcti.SRTTN as srttn from TB_CTR_TNK_INF tcti join
TB_CTR_TNK_RST tctr on UPPER(tcti.DSTRB_Q_ID) = UPPER(tctr.DSTRB_ID)
TB_CTR_TNK_RST tctr on UPPER(tcti.DSTRB_P_ID) = UPPER(tctr.DSTRB_ID)
WHERE tcti.TYPE = 0
AND tcti.USE_YN IN (#{pump_grp}, 0)
AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, interval 1 minute) AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, interval 5 minute), INTERVAL #{range} hour) AND MINUTE(tctr.RGSTR_TIME) % #{cycle} = 0 ) AS combined_results ORDER BY ts;

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(tr.TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ts, tr.VALUE as value, tcti.SRTTN as srttn from TB_CTR_TNK_INF tcti join
TB_RAWDATA tr on tcti.FRI_TAG = tr.TAGNAME
TB_RAWDATA tr on tcti.PRI_TAG = tr.TAGNAME
WHERE tcti.TYPE = #{type}
AND tcti.USE_YN IN (#{pump_grp}, 0)
AND tr.TS <= #{startDate} AND tr.TS >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL #{range} hour) AND MINUTE(tr.TS) % #{cycle} = 0 UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(tr.TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ts, tr.VALUE as value, tcti.SRTTN as srttn from TB_CTR_TNK_INF tcti join
TB_RAWDATA tr on tcti.FRI_TAG = tr.TAGNAME
TB_RAWDATA tr on tcti.PRI_TAG = tr.TAGNAME
WHERE tcti.TYPE = 0
AND tcti.USE_YN IN (#{pump_grp}, 0)
AND tr.TS <= #{startDate} AND tr.TS >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL #{range} hour) AND MINUTE(tr.TS) % #{cycle} = 0 ) AS combined_results ORDER BY ts;

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(tctr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ts,
tctr.FLW_ALG_RST_VAL
tctr.FP_ALG_RST_VAL
as value, tcti.SRTTN as srttn from TB_CTR_TNK_INF tcti join
TB_FR_VAL tctr on tcti.LINK_ID = tctr.LINK_ID WHERE tcti.FRI_TAG IS NOT NULL
AND UPPER(tcti.DSTRB_Q_ID) NOT IN
UPPER(#{name})
AND
TB_FP_VAL tctr on UPPER(tcti.NODE_ID) = UPPER(tctr.NODE_ID) WHERE tcti.PRI_TAG IS NOT NULL
AND UPPER(tcti.DSTRB_P_ID) NOT IN
UPPER(#{name})
AND
tctr.FLG = 'PRE' AND tcti.TYPE = 1 AND tcti.NODE_ID IS NOT NULL
AND tcti.USE_YN IN (#{pump_grp}, 0)
AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, interval 1 minute) AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, interval 1 minute), INTERVAL #{range} hour) AND MINUTE(tctr.RGSTR_TIME) % #{cycle} = 0 UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(tctr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ts,
tctr.FLW_ALG_RST_VAL
tctr.FP_ALG_RST_VAL
as value, tcti.SRTTN as srttn from TB_CTR_TNK_INF tcti join
TB_FR_VAL tctr on tcti.LINK_ID = tctr.LINK_ID WHERE tcti.FRI_TAG IS NOT NULL
AND UPPER(tcti.DSTRB_Q_ID) NOT IN
UPPER(#{name})
AND
TB_FP_VAL tctr on UPPER(tcti.NODE_ID) = UPPER(tctr.NODE_ID) WHERE tcti.PRI_TAG IS NOT NULL
AND UPPER(tcti.DSTRB_P_ID) NOT IN
UPPER(#{name})
AND
tctr.FLG = 'PRE' AND tcti.TYPE = 0 AND tcti.NODE_ID IS NOT NULL
AND tcti.USE_YN IN (#{pump_grp}, 0)
AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, interval 1 minute) AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, interval 1 minute), INTERVAL #{range} hour) AND MINUTE(tctr.RGSTR_TIME) % #{cycle} = 0 ) AS combined_results ORDER BY ts;

SELECT sum(tctr.PRDCT_VALUE) as value from TB_CTR_TNK_INF tcti join TB_CTR_TNK_RST tctr on tcti.DSTRB_Q_ID = tctr.DSTRB_ID WHERE UPPER(tcti.DSTRB_Q_ID) in
UPPER(#{id})
AND
tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, interval 1 minute) and tctr.RGSTR_TIME > DATE_SUB(DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, interval 5 minute), INTERVAL #{cycle} minute) group by tctr.RGSTR_TIME order by tctr.RGSTR_TIME desc limit 1
tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL #{cycle} minute) and tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL #{range} hour) and MINUTE(tctr.RGSTR_TIME) % #{cycle} = 0 group by tctr.RGSTR_TIME order by tctr.RGSTR_TIME
SELECT MNTH, STN_TM, TIMEZONE FROM TB_RT_RATE_INF WHERE RATE_IDX = 1 ORDER BY MNTH, STN_TM;

SELECT tctr.DSTRB_ID as junction_id, tctr.PRDCT_VALUE as value, DATE_FORMAT(tctr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ts from TB_CTR_TNK_RST tctr WHERE UPPER(tctr.DSTRB_ID) = UPPER(#{DSTRB_ID}) and tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= #{endDate} and tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= #{startDate} order by tctr.RGSTR_TIME

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(tctr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ts, MAX(CASE WHEN UPPER(tctr.DSTRB_ID) = UPPER('Q_GS_OLD_Predict') THEN tctr.PRDCT_VALUE END) as flow1, MAX(CASE WHEN UPPER(tctr.DSTRB_ID) = UPPER('P_GS_OLD_Predict') THEN tctr.PRDCT_VALUE END) as pressure1, MAX(CASE WHEN UPPER(tctr.DSTRB_ID) = UPPER('Q_GS_NEW_Predict') THEN tctr.PRDCT_VALUE END) as flow2, MAX(CASE WHEN UPPER(tctr.DSTRB_ID) = UPPER('P_GS_NEW_Predict') THEN tctr.PRDCT_VALUE END) as pressure2 FROM TB_CTR_TNK_RST tctr WHERE UPPER(tctr.DSTRB_ID) IN ( 'Q_GS_OLD_Predict', 'P_GS_OLD_Predict', 'Q_GS_NEW_Predict', 'P_GS_NEW_Predict' ) AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME <= #{endDate} AND tctr.RGSTR_TIME >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(tctr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ORDER BY ts;

SELECT tr.VALUE as value FROM TB_RAWDATA tr, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi WHERE tr.TAGNAME = tcppi.PMB_TAG and tcppi.PUMP_IDX = #{pump_idx} and tr.TS <= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 1 minute) and tr.TS >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 35 minute) order by tr.TS desc limit 30;

SELECT round(tr.VALUE) as value FROM TB_RAWDATA tr, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi WHERE tr.TAGNAME = tcppi.SPI_TAG and tcppi.PUMP_IDX = #{pump_idx} AND tcppi.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} and tr.TS <= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 1 minute) and tr.TS >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 35 minute) order by tr.TS desc limit 30;

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as TS, SUM(VALUE) AS value FROM TB_RAWDATA_15MIN WHERE tagname IN (SELECT PWI_TAG FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF where PUMP_GRP=#{pump_grp}) AND TS >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND TS <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY TS ORDER BY TS

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(inquiry.RGSTR_TIME, rst.RGSTR_TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as TS, COALESCE(inquiry.PRDCT_MEAN, rst.PRDCT_MEAN) AS PRDCT_MEAN, COALESCE(inquiry.TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, rst.TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT) AS TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, COALESCE(inquiry.PWR_PRDCT, rst.PWR_PRDCT) AS PWR_PRDCT FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST AS rst LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY AS inquiry ON rst.OPT_IDX = inquiry.OPT_IDX AND rst.PUMP_IDX = inquiry.PUMP_IDX WHERE rst.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} and rst.RGSTR_TIME >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND rst.RGSTR_TIME <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY rst.RGSTR_TIME ORDER BY rst.RGSTR_TIME ) AS subquery WHERE MINUTE(TS) % 15 = 0 ORDER BY TS;

SELECT SUM(VALUE) AS value FROM TB_RAWDATA_15MIN WHERE tagname IN (SELECT FRI_TAG FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF where PUMP_GRP=#{pump_grp}) AND TS >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND TS <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY TS ORDER BY TS

SELECT SUM(VALUE) AS value FROM TB_RAWDATA_15MIN WHERE tagname IN (SELECT PRI_T_TAG FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF where PUMP_GRP=#{pump_grp}) AND TS >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND TS <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY TS ORDER BY TS

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(inquiry.RGSTR_TIME, rst.RGSTR_TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as TS, COALESCE(inquiry.PUMP_YN, rst.PUMP_YN) AS value FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST AS rst LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY AS inquiry ON rst.OPT_IDX = inquiry.OPT_IDX AND rst.PUMP_IDX = inquiry.PUMP_IDX WHERE rst.PUMP_IDX = #{pump_idx} and rst.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} and rst.RGSTR_TIME >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND rst.RGSTR_TIME <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY rst.RGSTR_TIME ORDER BY rst.RGSTR_TIME ) AS subquery WHERE MINUTE(TS) % 15 = 0 ORDER BY TS;

select value from TB_RAWDATA_15MIN rdh, TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi where rdh.TAGNAME = cppi.PMB_TAG and cppi.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} and cppi.PUMP_IDX = #{pump_idx} AND rdh.TS >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') and rdh.TS <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') ORDER BY rdh.TS
mapper.sql: WITH RECURSIVE A AS ( SELECT STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') AS TS UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(A.TS, INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) FROM A WHERE A.TS < STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') )
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(tr.VALUE * tpti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE) AS pwr FROM A i LEFT JOIN TB_RAWDATA tr ON i.TS = tr.TS LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi ON tr.TAGNAME = tcppi.PWI_TAG LEFT JOIN TB_PEAK_TAG_INF tpti ON tr.TAGNAME = tpti.PWI_TAG WHERE tcppi.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} OR tr.TS IS NULL GROUP BY i.TS ORDER BY i.TS;

SELECT tr.VALUE as flow FROM A i LEFT JOIN TB_RAWDATA tr ON i.TS = tr.TS LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi ON tr.TAGNAME = tcppi.FRI_TAG WHERE tcppi.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} OR tr.TS IS NULL GROUP BY i.TS ORDER BY i.TS;

SELECT i.TS, COALESCE(t2.PWR_PRDCT, t1.PWR_PRDCT) AS pwr, COALESCE(t2.PRDCT_MEAN, t1.PRDCT_MEAN) AS flow FROM A i LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST t1 ON i.TS = t1.RGSTR_TIME LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY t2 ON t1.OPT_IDX = t2.OPT_IDX AND t1.PUMP_IDX = t2.PUMP_IDX AND t1.RGSTR_TIME = t2.RGSTR_TIME WHERE t1.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} OR t1.RGSTR_TIME IS NULL GROUP BY i.TS ORDER BY i.TS

, CTE AS ( SELECT i.TS AS RGSTR_TIME, t1.PUMP_IDX, t1.PUMP_GRP, COALESCE(t2.PUMP_YN, t1.PUMP_YN) AS PUMP_YN, COALESCE(t2.PWR_PRDCT, t1.PWR_PRDCT) AS pwr, COALESCE(t2.PRDCT_MEAN, t1.PRDCT_MEAN) AS flow FROM A i LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST t1 ON i.TS = t1.RGSTR_TIME AND t1.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY t2 ON t1.OPT_IDX = t2.OPT_IDX AND t1.PUMP_IDX = t2.PUMP_IDX AND t1.RGSTR_TIME = t2.RGSTR_TIME AND t1.PUMP_GRP = t2.PUMP_GRP ) SELECT RGSTR_TIME, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PUMP_YN = 1 THEN PUMP_IDX END ORDER BY PUMP_IDX ASC) AS PUMP_YN_RST, pwr, flow FROM CTE GROUP BY RGSTR_TIME;
select CONVERT(VALUE, UNSIGNED) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TAGNAME = '565-340-IVC-4001' AND TS <= #{ts} and TS >= DATE_SUB(#{ts}, interval 10 minute) ORDER BY TS desc limit 1

select VALUE FROM TB_RAWDATA tr JOIN TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tc ON tr.TAGNAME = tc.SPI_TAG WHERE tr.TS = (select max(TS) from TB_RAWDATA where TS <= DATE_SUB(#{targetDate}, interval 1 minute) and TS > DATE_SUB(#{targetDate}, interval 10 minute)) AND tc.PUMP_IDX = #{pump_idx}

select CONVERT(VALUE, UNSIGNED) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TAGNAME = '565-340-IVC-4001' AND TS <= DATE_SUB(#{targetDate}, INTERVAL 1 minute) and TS >= DATE_SUB(#{targetDate}, INTERVAL 35 minute) order by TS desc limit 30;
SELECT VALUE from TB_RAWDATA WHERE TAGNAME = #{tagname} and TS <= #{nowDateTime} and TS >= DATE_SUB(#{nowDateTime}, interval 10 minute) ORDER BY TS desc limit 1
SELECT AVG(VALUE) as VALUE from TB_RAWDATA WHERE TAGNAME = #{tagname} and TS <= #{nowDateTime} and TS >= DATE_SUB(#{nowDateTime}, interval 5 minute)
SELECT AVG(VALUE) as VALUE from TB_RAWDATA WHERE TAGNAME = #{tagname} and TS <= #{nowDateTime} and TS >= DATE_SUB(#{nowDateTime}, interval 5 minute)

SELECT CAST(COALESCE(t2.FREQ, t1.FREQ) as INT) AS value FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST t1 LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY t2 ON t1.OPT_IDX = t2.OPT_IDX AND t1.PUMP_IDX = t2.PUMP_IDX AND t1.RGSTR_TIME = t2.RGSTR_TIME WHERE t1.PUMP_IDX = #{pump_idx} AND t1.RGSTR_TIME <= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 1 minute) and t1.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{startDate}, INTERVAL 65 minute) order by t1.RGSTR_TIME desc limit 60;

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(rst.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as rgstr_time, rst.PUMP_YN_RST as 'pre_comb', raw.PUMP_USE_RST as 'cur_comb', rst.FREQ_VALUES as 'pre_freq', raw.SPI_USE_RST as 'cur_freq' FROM (SELECT A.RGSTR_TIME, GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN A.PUMP_YN = 1 THEN A.PUMP_IDX END ORDER BY A.PUMP_IDX ASC) AS PUMP_YN_RST, GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN A.FREQ != 0 THEN ROUND(A.FREQ) END ORDER BY A.FREQ ASC) AS FREQ_VALUES FROM ( SELECT t1.PUMP_IDX, COALESCE(t2.PUMP_YN, t1.PUMP_YN) AS PUMP_YN, COALESCE(t2.RGSTR_TIME, t1.RGSTR_TIME) AS RGSTR_TIME, COALESCE(t2.RATE_CTGRY, 'None') AS RATE_CTGRY, COALESCE(t2.FREQ, t1.FREQ) AS FREQ, COALESCE(t2.FLOW_CTR, 'None') AS FLOW_CTR, CASE WHEN t2.OPT_IDX is not null THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST t1 LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY t2 ON t1.OPT_IDX = t2.OPT_IDX AND t1.PUMP_IDX = t2.PUMP_IDX AND t1.RGSTR_TIME = t2.RGSTR_TIME WHERE t1.RGSTR_TIME >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND t1.RGSTR_TIME <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:00') ) A GROUP BY A.RGSTR_TIME ) rst LEFT JOIN (SELECT tr.TS as TS, GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN tr.VALUE = 1 THEN tc.PUMP_IDX END ORDER BY tc.PUMP_IDX ASC) AS PUMP_USE_RST, GROUP_CONCAT( CASE WHEN tr.TAGNAME = tc.SPI_TAG AND ROUND(tr.VALUE) != 0 THEN ROUND(tr.VALUE) END ORDER BY tc.PUMP_IDX ASC SEPARATOR ',' ) AS SPI_USE_RST FROM TB_RAWDATA tr JOIN TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tc ON tr.TAGNAME = tc.PMB_TAG OR tr.TAGNAME = tc.SPI_TAG WHERE tr.TS >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND tr.TS <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:00') GROUP BY tr.TS) raw ON rst.RGSTR_TIME = raw.TS GROUP BY rst.RGSTR_TIME ORDER BY rst.RGSTR_TIME;

SELECT tr.TS, CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN tr.TAGNAME = '780-344-PRC-6004' THEN tr.VALUE END) AS DOUBLE) AS `780-344-PRC-6004`, CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN tr.TAGNAME = '780-344-PRC-4004' THEN tr.VALUE END) AS DOUBLE) AS `780-344-PRC-4004` FROM TB_RAWDATA tr WHERE tr.TAGNAME IN ('780-344-PRC-6004', '780-344-PRC-4004') AND tr.TS = ( SELECT MAX(TS) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS <= NOW() AND TS > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) ) GROUP BY tr.TS;

SELECT ROUND(CAST(COALESCE(inquiry.TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT, rst.TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT) AS DOUBLE), 1) AS TUBE_PRSR_PRDCT FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST AS rst LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY AS inquiry ON rst.OPT_IDX = inquiry.OPT_IDX AND rst.PUMP_GRP = inquiry.PUMP_GRP AND rst.RGSTR_TIME = inquiry.RGSTR_TIME WHERE rst.RGSTR_TIME <= #{nowDate} AND rst.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{nowDate}, INTERVAL #{interval} MINUTE) AND rst.PUMP_GRP = #{pumpGrp} GROUP BY rst.RGSTR_TIME ORDER BY rst.RGSTR_TIME DESC LIMIT #{limit};

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_MNL_CHN_LOG WHERE RGSTR_TIME > DATE_SUB(#{serverTime}, INTERVAL #{interval} MINUTE)
AND PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp};

SELECT COALESCE(inquiry.CHNG_STTS, rst.CHNG_STTS) AS CHNG_STTS FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST AS rst LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY AS inquiry ON rst.OPT_IDX = inquiry.OPT_IDX AND rst.PUMP_GRP = inquiry.PUMP_GRP AND rst.RGSTR_TIME = inquiry.RGSTR_TIME WHERE rst.RGSTR_TIME <= #{nowDate} AND rst.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{nowDate}, INTERVAL #{interval} MINUTE) GROUP BY rst.RGSTR_TIME ORDER BY rst.RGSTR_TIME DESC LIMIT #{limit};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_MNL_CHN_LOG (RGSTR_TIME, OPER, PUMP_GRP, NewPumpComb, NewPumpFreq, AgoPumpComb, AgoPumpFreq) VALUES( #{nowDate}, #{oper}, #{pump_grp}, #{newPumpComb}, #{newPumpFreq}, #{agoPumpComb}, #{agoPumpFreq} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE NewPumpComb = #{newPumpComb}, NewPumpFreq = #{newPumpFreq}, AgoPumpComb = #{agoPumpComb}, AgoPumpFreq = #{agoPumpFreq};
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(COALESCE(t2.FREQ, t1.FREQ) as INT) AS value FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST t1 LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY t2 ON t1.OPT_IDX = t2.OPT_IDX AND t1.PUMP_IDX = t2.PUMP_IDX AND t1.RGSTR_TIME = t2.RGSTR_TIME WHERE t1.PUMP_IDX = #{pump_idx} AND t1.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} AND t1.RGSTR_TIME <= #{nowDate} and t1.RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(#{nowDate}, INTERVAL #{interval} minute) order by t1.RGSTR_TIME desc limit #{limit};
SELECT CAST(DEFAULT_VALUE as DOUBLE) as DEFAULT_VALUE FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE FUNC_TYP = #{func_typ};
SELECT DEFAULT_VALUE as DEFAULT_VALUE, TAG_DSC as TAG_DSC, TAG as PUMP_COMB FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE FUNC_TYP = #{func_typ};
UPDATE TB_WPP_TAG_CODE SET TAG_DSC= #{nowDate}, DEFAULT_VALUE= #{value} WHERE FUNC_TYP = #{func_typ};
UPDATE TB_WPP_TAG_CODE SET DEFAULT_VALUE= #{value}, TAG = #{pumpComb} WHERE FUNC_TYP = #{func_typ};
SELECT PUMP_IDX, PUMP_TYP FROM TB_PUMP_COMBINATION WHERE PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} AND PUMP_COUNT = #{pump_count} AND PUMP_PRIORITY = #{pump_priority} AND PUMP_YN = 1 ORDER BY PUMP_IDX;
SELECT PUMP_IDX, PUMP_TYP FROM TB_PUMP_COMBINATION WHERE PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} AND PUMP_COUNT = #{pump_count} AND PUMP_YN = 1 ORDER BY PUMP_PRIORITY, PUMP_IDX;
SELECT CAST(DEFAULT_VALUE AS DOUBLE) AS DEFAULT_VALUE FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE FUNC_TYP = 'NGHTM_CNDTN' AND TAG_DSC = #{hour};
SELECT CAST(DEFAULT_VALUE AS DOUBLE) AS DEFAULT_VALUE FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE FUNC_TYP = 'HUJA_CNDTN' AND TAG_DSC = #{hour};

SELECT tpc.PUMP_GRP, tpc.PUMP_IDX, tpc.PUMP_COUNT, tpc.PUMP_PRIORITY, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX, tpc.PUMP_YN, tcppi.PUMP_NM, tpc.PUMP_SIZE, tpc.PUMP_TYP FROM TB_PUMP_COMBINATION tpc LEFT JOIN TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi ON tpc.PUMP_IDX = tcppi.PUMP_IDX WHERE tpc.PUMP_GRP = #{pump_grp} AND tpc.PUMP_COUNT = #{pump_count} AND tpc.PUMP_PRIORITY = #{pump_priority} ORDER BY PUMP_IDX;
SELECT PUMP_COMB, P_ADD_VAL, P_MUL_VAL, P_SQRT_MUL_VAL, FC_MIN_VAL, FC_MAX_VAL FROM TB_PUMP_CAL WHERE PUMP_GRP = #{grp} AND C_ORD = 1 ORDER BY PUMP_COUNT, PUMP_PRIORITY, COUNT_IDX, C_ORD ;
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO EMS_DB.TB_PUMP_COMB_POWER (PUMP_COMB, PWR_UNIT_COST, ESTM_PWR, AVG_FLOW) VALUES
( #{mapItem.comb}, #{mapItem.pwrUnitCost}, #{mapItem.pwr}, #{mapItem.flow} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE PWR_UNIT_COST = VALUES(PWR_UNIT_COST), ESTM_PWR = VALUES(ESTM_PWR), AVG_FLOW = VALUES(AVG_FLOW)
